headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Regency Centers, Raises Price Target to $85
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $82 to $85.
